description: Unrecognized marker string (see the bridge log; add it to the codebook in lsl_bridge.py)
Tone stimulus onset (audible). Reaction time is measured from here.
Spacebar pressed within the 2 s response window. The RT in ms is in the behavioural CSV, not the code.
Spacebar pressed before the tone (false alarm / anticipation). Resets the stimulus timer.
No press within the 2 s response window (omission / miss).
Behavioural run begins — heating control condition.
Behavioural run begins — 850 nm NIR pulsed at 10 Hz.
Behavioural run begins — 850 nm NIR pulsed at 40 Hz.
Behavioural run begins — silent Wrist EMG run (no tones, no NIR).
Behavioural run ends — heating control condition.
Behavioural run ends — 10 Hz NIR.
Behavioural run ends — 40 Hz NIR.
Behavioural run ends — Wrist EMG.
Stimulation block starts — heater warming (no NIR light).
NIR stimulation starts — 850 nm pulsed at 10 Hz, 50% duty. Light physically ON.
NIR stimulation starts — 850 nm pulsed at 40 Hz, 50% duty. Light physically ON.
Stimulation block ends or is aborted — NIR/heater OFF.
Heater element switched ON (heating-control thermostat, target 37.5 C).
Heater element switched OFF.
Condition switched live mid-run to Heating control.
Condition switched live mid-run to 10 Hz NIR.
Condition switched live mid-run to 40 Hz NIR.
40 C skin-temperature safety cutoff latched — all stimulation force-stopped.
